summary: Completed testing of Footer updates, Home page Our Services section, and new ETI EduConnect page. All backend APIs (14/14) passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
Backend: GET /api/ returns API info
Backend: GET /api/educonnect/universities returns 200 with list
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/universities creates university
Backend: GET /api/educonnect/programs returns 200 with list
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/programs creates program
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/enquiry creates enquiry successfully
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/enquiry works with minimal data (name, phone only)
Backend: GET /api/educonnect/enquiries returns 200 with list
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/enquiry validates missing name (422)
Backend: POST /api/educonnect/enquiry validates missing phone (422)
Backend: POST /api/quick-enquiry creates enquiry
Backend: GET /api/quick-enquiry returns 200 with list
Backend: POST /api/contact creates contact enquiry
Frontend: Home page loads with 'Our Services' section
Frontend: Corporate Training service card displayed with description
Frontend: Fly Me A Trainer service card displayed with description
Frontend: Footer shows 'Designed & Developed by Wizbang' with link to www.wizbang.in
Frontend: Footer shows 'Copyscape Protected' badge
Frontend: Footer shows 'DMCA Protected' badge
Frontend: Footer Resources section includes 'ETI EduConnect' link
Frontend: Our Branches shows 'Pathankot' without 'Head Office'
Frontend: EduConnect page loads at /eti-educonnect
Frontend: EduConnect has simplified header showing 'ETI EduConnect' text
Frontend: EduConnect header shows phone number 8699391076
Frontend: EduConnect does NOT have main ETI menu items (simplified layout)
Frontend: EduConnect enquiry form has name input field
Frontend: EduConnect enquiry form has phone input field
Frontend: EduConnect enquiry form has qualification dropdown
Frontend: EduConnect enquiry form has program interest dropdown
Frontend: EduConnect enquiry form has message textarea
Frontend: EduConnect form submission works - shows success toast and Thank You message
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx properly updated with 5 certification badges including Copyscape and DMCA Protected
Wizbang credit link correctly points to www.wizbang.in
ETI EduConnect link properly added to Resources section in footer
HomePage.jsx includes comprehensive Our Services section with Corporate Training and Fly Me A Trainer cards
EduConnectPage.jsx has its own simplified layout without main ETI navigation menu
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for UI testing
EduConnect enquiry API supports both full data and minimal (name, phone) submissions
seed_data_creation: Test enquiries created via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features implemented and tested: Footer now shows Wizbang credit, Copyscape Protected and DMCA Protected badges, ETI EduConnect link in Resources, and Pathankot without 'Head Office'. Home page has Our Services section with Corporate Training and Fly Me A Trainer cards. EduConnect page at /eti-educonnect has its own simplified header layout showing only 'ETI EduConnect' branding and phone 8699391076. The enquiry form with name, phone, qualification, program interest, and message fields works correctly with POST /api/educonnect/enquiry endpoint.
